profile.name: Elena Krayneva
profile.subheadline: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics student with hands-on experience in **data analysis**, **KPI reporting**, and **marketing strategy**. Combining structured analytical thinking with a strong business understanding to turn data into actionable insights.
profile.about: MSc Digital Marketing & Analytics student with a background in business consultancy and a strong interest in how positioning, performance drivers, and data-informed insights shape strategic growth decisions.

experience.companyDescription: One of Russia's leading high-load digital retailers, managing logistics and delivery for major grocery chains.
bullets: Analyzed workforce datasets (headcount, onboarding, attrition, leave trends) using SQL and Excel.
Translated complex data into performance-driven insights to support strategic workforce planning.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to optimize reporting accuracy and decision-making speed.

experience.companyDescription: Former PwC Russia, specializing in high-level strategic and operational consulting.
bullets: Coordinated contracting workflows for 40+ freelance consultants monthly, ensuring legal/finance alignment.
Optimized internal approval processes, reducing bottleneck time for contractor onboarding.
Managed operational reporting for various consulting project workstreams.

experience.companyDescription: Market leader in flexible workforce management and workforce logistics.
bullets: Coordinated daily shift allocations for a pool of 3,000 employees using internal ERP systems.
Maintained 95%+ operational continuity through proactive workforce scheduling and conflict resolution.
Reduced administrative errors in shift reporting through dashboard optimization.

experience.companyDescription: Global specialist in electrical and digital building infrastructures.
bullets: Supported the regional recruitment roadmap by managing job postings and candidate funnels.
Facilitated initial communication for technical and corporate roles across multiple departments.

experience.companyDescription: Early-stage HealthTech startup focusing on AI-driven diagnostics.
bullets: Structured internal documentation workflows and knowledge management systems.
Analyzed external funding landscapes, identifying key grant opportunities for startup scaling.
Assisted in competitive market research to refine product valuation and positioning.

education.description: Advanced coursework in GA4, SQL, SEO, and Marketing Science. Focus on data-driven strategic growth.
Focus on data-driven management, organizational behavior, and business process modeling.
